steps.title: Identify the time signal
steps.content: The phrase “since 1945” indicates an action that started in the past and continues to the present.

steps.title: Apply the present perfect rule
steps.content:
Present perfect tense (has collected) is the required form when since links an action to a past starting point, showing it continues to now.

The other three choices violate this rule by using tenses that don't establish this past-to-present connection.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
